name: Killer Pancakes
recipeIngredient: Maple syrup OR chopped fresh strawberries macerated with a little sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray two nonstick cookie sheets with vegetable oil and set aside.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients in a bowl.
4. Beat the egg whites until frothy.
5. Add the canned fruit juice to the egg whites and beat well.
6. Gradually add the sifted dry mixture, stirring until well combined.
7. Fold in the reserved canned fruit or chopped fresh strawberries (and sugar).
8. Using a 2 tablespoon measure (coffee scoop), scoop dollops of pancake batter onto the prepared pans, leaving at least 2 inches between each pancake.
9. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until puffed and golden.
10. Serve hot with maple syrup, fresh strawberries, peaches, or other fruit.
